feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Drifting
entry.content: The most peculiar feeling has gripped me… yes, tightly, as if a vise has gripped me… I am in quite a singular condition, one which makes me feel on edge and agitated. My money is running out… In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn item with her… yes, my late father’s silver watch… with her to get some more money. But then she tried to cheat me out of my money… a whole 2 roubles and 35 kopecks is what I lost. I feel exploited and cheated… Suddenly an intense loathing of her rose up in me. But the question at the root of it is why this</i? thought is torturing me? Why do I think this? She does not deserve to live, she is despicable and a menace to society… but I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again. I went to the pothouse for a reason that I can’t explain, and met a man who seemed venerable if a little worn. Yes… Marmeladov was his name… A bit curious but no matter, he struck up an interesting conversation. We talked for a while… He seems to have it worse than I do… poor man. I hope his fortunes take a turn for the better.
entry.summary: The most peculiar feeling has gripped me… yes, tightly, as if a vise has gripped me… I am in quite a singular condition, one which makes me feel on edge and agitated. My money is running out… In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn item with her… yes, my late father’s silver watch… with her to get some more money. But then she tried to cheat me out of my money… a whole 2 roubles and 35 kopecks is what I lost. I feel exploited and cheated… Suddenly an intense loathing of her rose up in me. But the question at the root of it is why this</i? thought is torturing me? Why do I think this? She does not deserve to live, she is despicable and a menace to society… but I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again. I went to the pothouse for a reason that I can’t explain, and met a man who seemed venerable if a little worn. Yes… Marmeladov was his name… A bit curious but no matter, he struck up an interesting conversation. We talked for a while… He seems to have it worse than I do… poor man. I hope his fortunes take a turn for the better.

entry.title: Confusion and Control
entry.content: I can feel my desires coming up…. That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! It broils up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that.
entry.summary: I can feel my desires coming up…. That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! It broils up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that.

entry.title: Displaying External Posts on Your al-folio Blog

link.title: Displaying External Posts on Your al-folio Blog
